title: sida urens
intro: Sida urens, also known as burning heart or toothpick weed, is a plant species in the mallow family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Sida urens have been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Sida urens is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and creams, and is also used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and wounds.
